ELITEJOE
Create an original Mandopop song inspired by the vibe only of “Cupid” (no copying melody or lyrics), Must feel youthful, romantic, dreamy, playful, soft, emotional, and addictive, Style: modern Korean-pop influenced Mandopop, polished, cute yet cool, nostalgic but fresh, Sound: bouncy bass, tight snare/clap, soft funky guitar, bright pluck synths, airy pads, sparkly textures, clean commercial pop production, No heavy EDM, trap, or dark tones, Tempo: 118–124 BPM, Vocals: female Mandarin lead, sweet soft tone, slightly breathy verses, expressive emotional delivery, layered harmonies in chorus, strong catchy hook, Melody: very simple ultra-catchy topline, cute intimate verses, emotional rising pre-chorus, unforgettable chorus hook within first 20 seconds, dreamy nostalgic flow, Lyrics: Mandarin Chinese only, about shy crush, young love, secret feelings, hesitation, heart racing, almost confession, sweet longing, hopeful uncertainty, Optional light English ad-libs
